hero.title: Nhyehy…õe a …õb…õma …îmanfo anya ho kwan
hero.lead: Nhyehy…õe yi kyer…õ …îmanfo nnwuma a w…îhw…õ so w…î IATF no mu. Nhyehy…õe…õ a w…îagye ato mu a …õfa kwan a nnipa betumi afa so anya mu ky…õfa, beae mu nne…õma, ne nnwinnade a w…îakora so w…î h…î no w…î h…î w…î ha.

intro: W…îakyer…õw nnwuma a w…îagye ato mu no w…î ha bere a w…îatintim no.

header.title: S…õ wohia …îkwan p…îtee bi a wob…õfa so anya mu ky…õfa a, fa no s…õ …õy…õ …îmanfo adwuma

paragraphs: IATF y…õ nhwehw…õmu w…î ahwehw…õde p…îtee bi a …õw…î h…î a wobetumi de ay…õ adwuma a mfaso w…î so w…î …îmanfo ani so.

emptyState.title: Nhyehy…õe biara nni h…î a w…îatintim
paragraphs: IATF rey…õ n'adwuma ho nhyehy…õe a edi kan.
Wubetumi de adesr…õ ak…îma bere a wohia …îkwan p…îtee bi a wob…õfa so anya bi no.
